name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: [Petition] I’m asking you to sign this petition and put pressure on Mitch McConnell to do the right thing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
| | | Please read the following petition signature request from Abigail Spanberger, and then [**add your name to demand that Senator Mitch McConnell bring important gun violence prevention legislation up for a vote in the Senate. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/l_tV409uAB_sGW9GdgwcENULKmQ_puNxdpbUgeqluNc=)
| [SIGN MY NAME »](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/l_tV409uAB_sGW9GdgwcENULKmQ_puNxdpbUgeqluNc=)
---

Peter --

Last month, the House took decisive action to pass a much needed gun violence prevention law in our country. So, I cast my vote in support of that bill, H.R. 8, which would enact more thorough background checks on every firearm purchase and closes gun purchasing loopholes.

The wide majority of Americans believe that we need to enact proper, commonsense background checks. This bill addresses the gun violence epidemic that has impacted so many communities across the country. **But unfortunately, this legislation to enact full background checks is currently being stalled by partisan political tactics in the Senate.**

Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell is so far refusing to even bring the H.R. 8 legislation to the Senate for a simple up-or-down vote. Not only is that unfair -- it is deliberately sabotaging our democratic process to score political points.

Peter, I'm a mother of three beautiful, young girls. I understand the seriousness of this issue that has particularly affected our nation's youth in an unprecedented number of school shootings. We have an obligation to act as a nation, and to work to prevent tragedies that stem from gun violence. Too many communities across our country, and right here in Virginia, have been affected to allow the first major legislative action in decades to fail.

[**Families across the country who have been impacted by gun violence deserve better. Will you add your name to this petition to demand that Mitch McConnell give H.R. 8 a vote in the Senate? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/l_tV409uAB_sGW9GdgwcENULKmQ_puNxdpbUgeqluNc=)
[SIGN MY NAME »](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/l_tV409uAB_sGW9GdgwcENULKmQ_puNxdpbUgeqluNc=)
---
We need to put pressure on Mitch McConnell and the Senate to take action on this bill. Your signature on this petition will help us show that the American public won't sit by while real commonsense gun violence legislation sits in waiting for a vote.

Thank you for taking action,

_Abigail_
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/xm-rQ1UfM1FMDuCNv-jaoZuGSxO-G-zxjxpNA9k0vgA=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaDuJnGbRfiKbnMjglAWw3RNsYcAChKdOEhjud4avEE=/zgAbcO2GutDI88lMqoD5HmGEag4Qsh1AdSVQtaav2Y0=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

name: Kirsten
subject: Before I take the stage tonight, will you let me know what your priority is for 2020?
body:
At 10 p.m. ET tonight, I'll be live on CNN for a town hall.

[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e0a/2ae112ef/6c45e8c0/357dd62e/1644911605/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")

Peter,
Tonight, I'll be live on CNN for a nationally televised town hall! I look forward to sharing my brave vision for the country. (Hope you'll tune in--10 p.m. EST!)
But before I do, I want to hear about the issues that are most important to you. Everywhere I go, I hear from parents, students and workers about the issues that keep them up at night. Often, it's health care, good jobs, their kids' education and protecting our planet for generations to come.
I hope to speak to all of those concerns and more tonight, but in case I haven't gotten to meet you out on the road yet, I wanted to ask:
**Can you share what's most important to you during the 2020 elections? It'll take less than two minutes. I'm committed to building a community-led movement rooted in the priorities of this team, so I hope you'll share your voice. I'm listening.**

subject: A Serious Blow to Iran’s Terror Specialists
body:
"In a bold step, President Trump has formally designated Iran’s Revolutionary Guard a terrorist organization." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d016e3636&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **A Serious Blow to Iran’s Terror Specialists**

“In a bold step, President Trump has formally designated Iran’s Revolutionary Guard a terrorist organization — a move that carries serious financial implications for Tehran and lengthy prison terms for those who provide material support,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. These sanctions are “vital to addressing the key elements that were deliberately omitted from the Obama nuke deal: Iran’s missile program and its fomenting of global terror.”

“As the president promised, withdrawing from that agreement was just one step in ratcheting up the pressure on Tehran. This is another critical step in that direction.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66bf80c9c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration has served the Iranian people and the cause of truth by dubbing the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps a terrorist group,” the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=542de5eaa8&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “The IRGC uses violence and economic leverage to achieve authoritarian ends. Calling them terrorists is salutary candor. The designation also serves the cause of peace.”
---
|
---
| “The left-wing media will never learn to tell the truth. That was reinforced when we learned that even though special counsel Robert Mueller’s cleared President Trump of false claims against him, many in the media energetically spun the report in a way that perpetuated their anti-Trump narrative of the last two years,” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c268a5b1f&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “The left and its compliant media are willfully reporting false news to the American people,” the _[Boston Herald](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=874b433999&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. Over the weekend, many media figures helped amplify a tweet that falsely claimed the President referred to migrants as “animals,” when in truth he was talking about the murderous MS-13 gang. “Americans can tweet what they want. Reputable media personnel, however, are entrusted to be the conveyors of truth . . . Those in media who propagated this toxic lie should be fired.”
---
|
---
| “A national security and humanitarian crisis exists at the U.S.-Mexico border — but, for Democrats, it is not critical enough to join with Republicans to fix broken border control and immigration systems,” Bradley Blakeman writes in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75145bd82a&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Instead of seeking compromise and solutions, Democrats seek to thwart the law and give more attention, aid and comfort to illegals than citizens. ‘Sanctuary cities’ and providing social services have only encouraged illegal immigration, overburdened local governments, and prevented Americans from enjoying the benefits of services they pay for but cannot access.”
---
|

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Can you take this quick survey?
body:
Your feedback is very important.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY)

**Take a couple minutes to complete our latest, official survey to say which issues are most important to you. We'll register the feedback and get it to Bernie.**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_april/?source=em190409-1-120&t=2&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY)
Sisters and Brothers -
It was not that long ago that the ideas driving our campaign were considered fringe or extreme.
Raising the minimum wage to a living wage. Too radical. Guaranteeing health care to all as a right, not a privilege. Too radical. Aggressively combating climate change. Too radical. Reforming our broken criminal justice and immigration systems. Too radical. Not taking money from super PACs and the rich. Too radical.
Well, today those same ideas are supported by not only the majority of Americans, but also by many other candidates for president. That is thanks in large part to our political revolution.
With the first fundraising quarter behind us, we wanted to check back in with you about the issues that matter most to you in this campaign.
**Take a couple minutes to complete our survey to say which issues are most important to you.**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_april/?source=em190409-1-120&t=3&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY)
Make no mistake about it, this struggle is not just about defeating Donald Trump. This struggle is about taking on the incredibly powerful institutions that control the economic and political life of this country.
And while we have won some victories in recent years, our struggles have not always been successful.
So as we begin another campaign, it's important to hear directly from you about the issues that motivate you. Because at the end of the day, it is the issues that drive the success of our campaign.
[**Share which issues you care about most by taking a few minutes to take our survey.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_april/?source=em190409-1-120&t=4&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY)
Your feedback is important, and we track how the collective response shifts over time. So thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us today.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=997_150750_KlK9gY&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=8&akid=997%2E150750%2EKlK9gY).

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The headline says it all, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Donald Trump and his statewide Republican allies have their sights set on turning Virginia red next year.
| | Dear Peter,

The headline says it all: "The blue state Trump thinks he can flip in 2020".

According to a recent article from Politico[1], Donald Trump and his statewide Republican allies have their sights set on turning Virginia red next year.

And it's not just talk. Vice President Mike Pence was campaigning in Virginia just last month, and has made promises to come back "as much as he's wanted". The article also mentions that Trump himself is convinced that "Virginia is in play" in 2020.

After all of our hard work in 2018, after overcoming so many obstacles to take back the House, to elect the most diverse class in the history of Congress and provide the American people with the kind of accessible, accountable leadership they deserve, we cannot afford to sit back and let Trump's prediction become reality.

That's why I won't be sitting on the sidelines, and I know you won't either.

Thanks to your hard work, I was elected in a district that hadn't sent a Democrat to Congress since 1968. In that time, I've made a concerted effort to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to deliver results for the people of the 7th District.

I've held town halls and community meetings in every county in the 7th. I've heard your concerns, your ideas and your hopes for a district and Commonwealth that works for average people; that promises a more equitable economy, a more effective healthcare system and a deep and abiding respect for the institutions that protect and secure our democracy.

But I've been clear-eyed since day-one: accomplishing these lofty goals and pushing back against an Administration that has promised to erase the progress we have made won't be easy.

It will take hard work, determination, and resolve. It will take dedication to our cause, and a commitment to our values. In short, it will take _you_.

[**That is why I 'm asking for you to show your support today by donating $5 or $25 to my campaign. The President, the Vice President and statewide Republican leadership are going all in on flipping the Commonwealth from blue to red next year. Will you help me hold the line? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZuRjDckoQYBBvHj3fJIgOxYpy-t758hsBTEntKVPib0=/UnalC2wiAIpmKT1BNYzGOwauMFz3AQG1dvA73LSHqFI=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.09_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZuRjDckoQYBBvHj3fJIgOxYpy-t758hsBTEntKVPib0=/UnalC2wiAIpmKT1BNYzGOwauMFz3AQG1dvA73LSHqFI=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.09_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
Thank you for your continued support,

_Abigail_

* * *
[1] Politico. "The blue state Trump thinks he can flip in 2020". March 29, 2019. [https://www.politico.com/story/2019/03/29/trump-virginia-elections-1243100](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZuRjDckoQYBBvHj3fJIgOxYpy-t758hsBTEntKVPib0=/M5VyVNItLCF0Qww1FMoYzlXOIKDlqt43j73g4pG6yXY=)

clean_body: Donald Trump and his statewide Republican allies have their sights set on turning Virginia red next year. | | Dear Peter, The headline says it all: "The blue state Trump thinks he can flip in 2020". According to a recent article from Politico[1], Donald Trump and his statewide Republican allies have their sights set on turning Virginia red next year. And it's not just talk. Vice President Mike Pence was campaigning in Virginia just last month, and has made promises to come back "as much as he's wanted". The article also mentions that Trump himself is convinced that "Virginia is in play" in 2020. After all of our hard work in 2018, after overcoming so many obstacles to take back the House, to elect the most diverse class in the history of Congress and provide the American people with the kind of accessible, accountable leadership they deserve, we cannot afford to sit back and let Trump's prediction become reality. That's why I won't be sitting on the sidelines, and I know you won't either. Thanks to your hard work, I was elected in a district that hadn't sent a Democrat to Congress since 1968. In that time, I've made a concerted effort to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to deliver results for the people of the 7th District. I've held town halls and community meetings in every county in the 7th. I've heard your concerns, your ideas and your hopes for a district and Commonwealth that works for average people; that promises a more equitable economy, a more effective healthcare system and a deep and abiding respect for the institutions that protect and secure our democracy. But I've been clear-eyed since day-one: accomplishing these lofty goals and pushing back against an Administration that has promised to erase the progress we have made won't be easy. It will take hard work, determination, and resolve. It will take dedication to our cause, and a commitment to our values. In short, it will take you. | Thank you for your continued support, Abigail * [1] Politico. "The blue state Trump thinks he can flip in 2020". name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Join me for an unforgettable cruise!
body:
| | You’re invited to the Baltics
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190409com01&n=1)
| Peter, I want to extend an invitation to you to join me on an unforgettable trip to the Baltics, August 9 to August 17, 2019! After many years of the Israel Experiences and our most recent trip the Mediterranean Experience cruise, we are bringing you another phenomenal cruise, the Baltic Experience! This all-inclusive cruise will feature some of the most beautiful places in the Baltic Sea, and we will get to travel to and absorb these destinations aboard a luxury cruise ship from the Azamara Cruise line. Join me along with Senator Rick Santorum, Conservative Radio Host Dan Celia, Brian White and Karyn Williams as we cruise the Baltics together! We will visit Stockholm and Visby Sweden, Talinn Estonia, St. Petersburg Russia, Helsinki Finland, and Copenhagen Denmark! If you have traveled with us before, you already know that all-inclusive means exactly that and there are no surprises along the way. The Baltic Experience will be no different. And when the weather is often unbearably hot throughout most of the US in August, we will be enjoying the cool and delightful weather that makes travel in the Baltic region perfect. Once again we have the entire ship and will fill our time on board with spectacular entertainment and special guests. In addition to the cruise we have multiple pre and post cruise offerings you can choose from to extend your trip. Our last cruise sold out in record time, so we encourage you to get your cabin secured soon. You can learn more about the exciting trip, including all the cruise details and rate information [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190409com01&n=2). If you have additional questions about the trip after visiting the website you can contact the Baltic Experience team [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FBgEtmL7MM07_M1G-_cBmCG&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190409com01&n=3). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190409com01&n=4) We work tirelessly and do everything in our control to bring you “The Greatest Trip.” We would love to see you on board! **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman

name: Team Beto
subject: Trump’s anti-immigration machine -- and next steps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Donald Trump just ousted the secretary of the Department of Homeland
Security and replaced her with a top immigration officer, Kevin McAleenan.
This administration shows no signs of slowing down their attacks on
immigrants, cloaked in lies that these families of refugees and asylum
seekers are a threat to national security.

This moment calls on us to do everything in our power to unite and elect a
new president who will stand up for all of us -- those who were born here
and those who came here seeking refuge and asylum. A president who will
not allow the DHS Secretary to separate families, tear gas kids, put
children in desert tent camps, or inflict irreversible damage not only on
our fellow human beings but on the conscience of this country.‬

To elect Beto, we need people in your community to knock on doors and
talk to voters the weekend of April 13-14, when we’re launching our
national voter contact program. But there’s no canvass event in your
community yet!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190409&t=1001&akid=27005%2E444211%2Ep_OJUv ]Add your name if you’re interested in leading a canvass April 13-14 (or
another time!) to help other volunteers knock on doors.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190409&t=1002&akid=27005%2E444211%2Ep_OJUv ]Add your name »

Now more than ever, we need to fight back against the dangerous narratives
about immigrants in this country. We should follow our asylum laws,
welcome immigrants, ensure everyone is treated with dignity, and share the
true story of immigration -- one that values the contributions so many
including Dreamers have made to our country. We hope you’ll do what you
can to help with immediate relief and a rapid response. But we also need
you to knock on doors to elect Beto.

This campaign’s success will come down to people-talking-to-people. It’s
the single most effective way to win votes. It’s going to be a ton of
work, but together we can rise to the challenge and build a new path
forward for this country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190409&t=1003&akid=27005%2E444211%2Ep_OJUv ]Be part of the next step to elect Beto in your community by leading a
canvass.

Onward,

Team Beto

P.S. If you’re physically prevented from knocking on doors, there are
other ways to help! Please fill out our volunteer form [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer/?source=ema20190409&t=1004&akid=27005%2E444211%2Ep_OJUv ]here.

name: Michael McKinley, Our Revolution Central Iowa, Scott Galindez Chapter
subject: Become a Medicare for All Citizen Co-sponsor
body:
In 2017, my friend Scott Galindez died of kidney failure.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a543/bed43eb/99b22014/75fb41f9/3530558146/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
In 2017, my friend Scott Galindez died of kidney failure. Scott was a longtime peace activist and leader of Our Revolution Central Iowa. He was committed to fighting for a world without war, poverty, and injustice. In fact, just days before he passed away he made one final plea for Medicare for All:
_" It is personal for me -- I am dying from kidney failure. My insurance company would rather pay for dialysis three times a week than cover a transplant...Private insurance has failed me all of my life. If I had grown up in a single-payer country, when I became diabetic it would have been treated, and I would not have damaged my kidneys while having untreated diabetes."_
[**The last thing people who are sick need is to be worried about paying medical bills or fighting with insurance companies. Tomorrow, Sen. Bernie Sanders is introducing his Medicare for All bill. Will you join me in becoming a citizen co-sponsor of this vital legislation?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a543/bed43eb/99b22014/75fb41f8/3530558146/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/co-sponsor-the-senate-medicare-for-all-act?source=em190409-6mps")
Following Scott's death, our town rallied and turned his funeral into a call to action for Medicare for All. Scott's death motivates me every day to keep fighting to make sure our country guarantees health care as a human right.
Our community is just one example of the type of organizing going on all across the country to pass Medicare for All. Our Revolution groups and leaders in Texas, California, Maryland, and Massachusetts are working to pass Medicare for All legislation in their cities and state legislatures.
**[The majority of Americans-- 7 out of 10 -- are already with us in supporting Medicare for All. Add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor of Sen. Our vice president – YOUR vice president – is under ATTACK and we need your help to push back.As you know, the left-wing of the Democrat Party... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/your-vice-president-is-under-attack?e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
| **#StandWithMike**
Indiana Republicans,

Our vice president – YOUR vice president – is under ATTACK and we need your help to push back.

As you know, the left-wing of the Democrat Party knows no bounds. They will say and do anything to demean, disparage and destroy their opponents, including, but not limited to, spreading outright lies and misinformation.

The latest example of this disturbing trend is South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg. Long believed to be a reasonable and even-keeled guy, he has made it a standard part of his stump speech to attack our vice president in very personal ways.

**This type of behavior cannot go unnoticed or unanswered.**

**We need YOUR help to push back! Would you be willing to post your support for Vice President Pence on your social media accounts?**

Small-city mayors like Pete Buttigieg are free to say what they want – _this is America, after all_. But like anyone else in politics, they should be held accountable when wrong. _And Pete Buttigieg is wrong._

**Mike Pence is a man of integrity who cares about his family, fights to protect our country and actively defends our Constitution. He has served us in Congress and in the Indiana Statehouse, and is now working every day to Make America Great Again.**

When he was governor of Indiana, here’s what Mike Pence was saying about Pete Buttigieg:

**_“I hold Mayor Buttigieg in the highest personal regard. We have a great working relationship. I see him as a dedicated public servant, and a patriot.”

“I especially want to mention to you today, particularly, South Bend, Indiana, is so blessed to have an energetic, innovative, forward-looking, creative mayor in Pete Buttigieg.”_**

Let’s be honest. Pete Buttigieg’s attacks are nothing more than an attempt to earn sensational headlines in a who’s-the-most-liberal Democratic primary contest. He probably doesn’t even believe what he’s saying, but it definitely gets him the headlines he wants and lots of online clicks.

**But YOU can help spread the message of TRUTH about Vice President Pence.**

So, go ahead, close this email and open up your Facebook, Twitter or Instagram page and publicly declare that you stand with Vice President Pence against these attacks and that you won’t let mean spirited rhetoric go unchecked.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The world’s worst immigration laws
body:
Time and again, President Donald J. Trump has warned that America’s immigration and border security systems are outdated and at risk... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b3f57394d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 9, 2019
---
| | |
# **The world’s worst immigration laws**

**Time and again,** President Donald J. Trump has warned that America’s immigration and border security systems are outdated and at risk of being overwhelmed. Today, nearly 3 years after he first issued a call to action, that is exactly what is happening.

**The problem begins** with a broken patchwork of immigration loopholes and opportunistic court rulings, which President Trump has asked Congress to help him fix for more than a year. The situation only grows worse by the day. “A liberal activist judge in San Francisco ruled the United States and Mexico can’t work together to address asylum issues at the border,” Press Secretary Sarah Sanders [wrote this morning](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9814d0693&e=3ee4985eea).

**Congress chose not to act**. So President Trump alone must address the consequences.

**In March,** U.S. Customs and Border Protection agents were involved in more than 100,000 border enforcement actions—the highest number for any single month in more than a decade. For context, that figure is up more than _500 percent_ since March 2017.

**Behind these numbers** is a new story and a new problem. In the past, a large majority of illegal immigrants were single adult males from Mexico who could be returned across the border quickly. Today, the surge comes from “asylum seekers” from Central America, many of whom are coached by smugglers on how to exploit America’s generous system for refugees.

**The predictable result** is a meltdown at our border, as law enforcement resources and personnel are diverted from core responsibilities and stretched far beyond capacity.

**On Friday** , President Trump got a firsthand look at the emergency on our border. There’s no way to prepare for “the amount of people, ‘family units,’ and children, and now organized caravans that are coming across this border today,” Gloria Chavez, Chief Patrol Agent of the El Centro Sector, told him. “Our agents are being stretched in so many different directions.”

**All of this can be fixed** by Congress committing to immigration principles that a large majority of Americans agree with. But for now, it is up to President Trump to enforce our laws and close the gaps in our porous border.

**“It’s sad that Mexico** is now doing more to secure our border than Democrats,” Press Secretary Sanders writes. “President Trump will do whatever it takes to keep Americans safe.”

**[Asylum “child cages”—Obama built them. The media just didn’t care](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=298b74a0e9&e=3ee4985eea)****.**

**Statement****:** **[Press Secretary Sarah Sanders on district court ruling](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f009b3e46d&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## **Real reform for American taxpayers**

**When tax reform** was being debated in Washington two years ago, President Trump had a non-negotiable priority: giving working families a fair shake. Because of this commitment, Americans are seeing welcome changes when filing their tax returns this year.

**One of those changes** is a doubled child tax credit. When parents check that box this year, they’ll notice the credit has jumped from $1,000 to $2,000—per child.
🎬 [**Watch: Ivanka Trump on the new doubled child tax credit**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e926172d5e&e=3ee4985eea)
**Since its passage,** the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act has helped millions of Americans receive bonuses, wage increases, and other important benefits. With 2019 Tax Day almost here, Americans are beginning to see the full weight of the reform that’s been delivered.

**[See how President Trump’s tax reform is benefitting every community.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca02941f79&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
